objective: Navigate to product_id=28 — click Add to Cart — verify cart icon count updates to 1. Stop once cart count is confirmed.
Navigate to product_id=28 — click Add to Cart — open cart dropdown via top-right icon — verify item name and price visible. Stop once item is confirmed in dropdown.
Navigate to Laptops category (path=18) — verify product grid with thumbnails is visible. Stop once confirmed.
Navigate to Components category (path=25) — click Apple in Manufacturer sidebar — verify filtered results load. Stop once filtered list is confirmed.
Navigate to product_id=28 — verify product name (h1) and price are visible. Stop once both confirmed.
Navigate to homepage without login — verify banner and product listing section are visible. Stop once confirmed.
Navigate to homepage — type iPhone in search bar — press Enter — verify results page shows product thumbnails. Stop once results confirmed.
Navigate to /index.php?route=account/register — verify all fields: first name, last name, email, telephone, password are present. Stop once form fields confirmed.
Navigate to /index.php?route=account/login — enter credentials — click Login — verify URL contains route=account/account. Stop immediately once dashboard is confirmed. Do not navigate further.
Navigate to login page — log in — click My Account dropdown — click Logout — verify redirect to home page. Stop once home page confirmed.
Navigate to product_id=28 — click Add to Cart — navigate to checkout/cart — click Remove — verify cart shows empty. Stop once empty message confirmed.
Navigate to product_id=28 — click Add to Cart — navigate to checkout/cart — change quantity to 2 — click Update — verify line total recalculates. Stop once updated total confirmed.
Navigate to category path=20 — select Price (Low > High) from Sort By — verify product grid order changes. Stop once sort applied.
Log in — navigate to product_id=40 — click Add to Wish List — verify success message or wishlist page. Stop once confirmation visible.

Navigate to product_id=28 — click Add to Cart — navigate to checkout/checkout — select Guest Checkout — fill address form — select Flat Rate shipping — verify proceed to payment. Stop once shipping confirmed.
